source_description: Plane.so full integration for AgilePlus - extend existing agileplus-plane crate with two-way sync, state persistence, CLI wiring, Plane state mapping, webhook listener, and label management. Full platform infrastructure including NATS, Dragonfly/Valkey, Neo4j, MinIO, Process Compose orchestration. Event-sourced persistence, Web UI dashboard, multi-device sync via git + P2P/Tailscale.
